budget_curve_note: Class-priority ranking (strong>contra>mild>supp) due to absence of continuous R4 scores in frozen prediction files.
field_renaming_note: predicted_strong_by_silver_class was previously mislabeled as fp_by_silver_class; it counts all R4-predicted-strong samples (TP+FP) grouped by silver class. actual_false_positive_by_silver_class is FP-only (excludes strong_action_overclaim=9 since those are TP, not FP).
